title: lastrea argentina
intro: Lastrea argentina, also known as Argentine fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lastrea argentina include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Lastrea argentina include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
